steps: File NTA Form 11 (Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax) with MUFG Custody to reclaim JPY 119,850 excess withholding
Provide documentation confirming JP-NO treaty 10% rate applies to Norwegian beneficial owner CLIENT01
Submit NTA Form 1 (Application for Income Tax Convention) if treaty rate certification was missing
Follow up with MUFG Custody within 30 days to ensure refund processing for Nintendo Co Ltd (7974) dividend

references.title: NTA – Refund of Overpaid Withholding Tax (Form 11)
NTA – Application Forms for Income Tax Convention (Form 1 for dividends)
